status.linked: Akawunti ya ku OSI Server eyungibbwa

warning.title: Kigambiddwa
warning.message: After linking, you must use your OSI Server credentials to log in. OSI OS stores a gateway-specific offline verifier for linked login.

success.title: Kiyungibwa bulungi
success.message: Akawunti yo kati eyungiddwa nga {{username}} ku OSI Server.

unlink.confirm: Oli mukakafu? Oluvannyuma lw'okugyamu, oteekwa okozesa ekigambo kyo ky'okulinda eky'omu bitundu ekya mazima.

errors.networkError: Teyinziddwa kutuuka ku OSI Server. Kebera endabirwamu n'okuteekateeka kwo kw'omukutu.
errors.authFailed: Ebintu by'okuyingira by'OSI Server si bya mazima.
errors.forceSyncFailed: Manual sync failed. Please try again.

sync.title: Manual sync
sync.description: Run an immediate recovery sync with OSI Server.
sync.pending: Pending commands fetched: {{fetched}}, queued for local apply: {{queued}}
sync.pendingAfterResponse: Local apply continues after this response returns.

reauth.title: Sync token expired
reauth.description: Re-authenticate with OSI Server to mint a fresh sync token for this gateway.
